expertAssessments.rationale: Mistral ministral-3b passed the NLQ schema/intent/executionMode corpus, but current Groq production schema compatibility failed under direct provider smoke.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Fix NLQ EntitySchema structured-output compatibility first, then rerun a smaller Groq vs ministral-3b smoke before switching the production default.

completedImprovements.title: Run low-priority NLQ provider comparison smoke after v8.11.157 deployment

pendingImprovements.title: NLQ EntitySchema must use provider-compatible required nullable fields before Groq/OpenAI-compatible structured output can be trusted
pendingImprovements.note: Current route schema with optional top-level fields caused Groq structured output schema rejection in direct provider smoke. Strict required nullable schema recovered Groq to 3/4, while Mistral ministral-3b remained 4/4.

wontFixImprovements.title: Evaluate Mistral ministral-3b as front NLQ primary or fallback after schema compatibility fix
wontFixImprovements.note: Low-priority provider decision item. ministral-3b was 4/4 schema, intent, and executionMode on this small corpus with p95 885ms and no 429.
wontFixImprovements.policyNote: 포트폴리오 운영성 우선 규칙: 비차단 항목은 과도한 개선을 방지하기 위해 WONT-FIX 처리합니다.

notes: Deployment check passed before smoke: /api/version returned 8.11.157.
Provider call volume was intentionally small: 4 fixtures per provider per schema variant; no 429 observed.
Decision: do not switch production NLQ provider yet. First fix schema compatibility, then rerun Groq vs ministral-3b only.
